basic_details.job_title: RVUNL Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 2005 Junior Engineer, Junior Accountant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Rajasthan Rajya Vidyut Utpadan Nigam Limited (RVUNL)
basic_details.post_name: Junior Engineer, Junior Assistant, Technician, Accountant & Other Posts
basic_details.short_information: Rajasthan Rajya Vidyut Utpadan Nigam Limited (RVUNL) has officially released a massive recruitment notification for 2026, offering thousands of vacancies across technical and non-technical posts. This recruitment drive is being conducted under Rajasthan’s power sector companies including RVUNL, JVVNL, AVVNL, JdVVNL, and RVPNL, making it one of the biggest state electricity department hiring opportunities.

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 2026 Application Start Date: July 2026 (Tentative) Last Date to Apply: July 2026 (Tentative) Exam Date: Updated Soon

qualification.details: Junior Engineer: B.Tech / B.E in relevant discipline Junior Accountant: B.Com / M.Com / MBA (Finance) Technician: ITI in relevant trade Assistant Posts: Graduate in any discipline Age Limit: 18–40 years (relaxation as per rules)

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are released in RVUNL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of around 2000+ vacancies are expected under RVUNL and related power companies.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification for RVUNL jobs?
faq.answer: ITI, Diploma, Engineering, and Graduation based on the post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: Written Exam followed by Document Verification.
